prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约3848→2740→2473→2011→1599，连续5年持续前移（位次数字逐年减小），近3年累计前移约874名，2025年基准位次约1599名，呈明显上升趋势；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为29人，2024年增至34人，2025年增至35人；2026年计划大幅缩减至19人，较2025年减少约45.7%，属明显缩招，名额减少将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；哈工大校本部2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第12名（Top20），威海校区共享校本部办学层次与学科资源，学校层次极高；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线相关讨论（中关注），但2025年无异常信号，整体舆情平稳偏正面；哈工大校本部第五轮学科评估中17个学科获评A-/A/A+，包括机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、力学A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A等；威海校区招生专业覆盖计算机、人工智能、自动化、电子信息等热门方向，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业为工科试验班（未来信息），涵盖计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全、自动化、通信工程、电子信息工程、集成电路等热门方向，社会热度高；云南省2026年普通高考总人数377900人，较2025年（285688人）大幅增加约32.3%，物理类考生按近年占比（约60.6%）估算约22.9万人，较2025年物理类17.3万人增加约5.6万人，竞争显著加剧；哈工大（威海）位于山东省威海市，对西南省份云南考生而言属跨省就读，地域偏好因素不突出。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1599名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减45.7%（名额减少加剧竞争）、云南省考生总数大幅增加约32%（竞争池扩大）、学校抖音高热及专业热度高等因素，虽缩招在供需弹性模型中指向位次前移，但考生规模激增与报考热度上升形成对冲，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年继续前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约1210名，区间1072–1348名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类仅设工科试验班（未来信息）1个招生专业大类，无专业分档选择空间。位次在预测区间1072–1348名内录取概率较高；位次优于区间下限（<1072名）可稳妥录取；位次低于区间上限（>1348名）则需谨慎。建议将该校作为冲刺目标，同时准备同层次其他985高校作为备选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 3848→2740→2473→2011→1599, moving forward continuously for 5 consecutive years (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). In the past 3 years, it has moved forward by about 874 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1599, showing a clear upward trend. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science/physics category: 29 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 34 in 2024, and to 35 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is significantly reduced to 19 students, a decrease of about 45.7% compared to 2025, which is a clear reduction in enrollment, and the decrease in spots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, Harbin Institute of Technology's main campus ranked 12th (Top 20) on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking. The Weihai campus shares the main campus's educational level and disciplinary resources, with an extremely high university level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin university popularity total ranking 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants. In 2024, there were discussions related to the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but no abnormal signals in 2025, with overall public opinion stable and slightly positive. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation by HIT main campus, 17 disciplines were rated A-/A/A+, including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, etc. The Weihai campus enrollment majors cover popular directions such as computer science, artificial intelligence, automation, electronic information, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the enrollment major is Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information), covering popular directions such as computer science and technology, artificial intelligence, cyberspace security, automation, communication engineering, electronic information engineering, integrated circuits, etc., with high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in Yunnan Province is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (285,688). Physics category students, estimated at about 60.6% of the recent proportion, are about 229,000, an increase of about 56,000 compared to 173,000 physics category students in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. HIT (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, which is an inter-provincial study for Yunnan candidates in the southwest, with no prominent regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1599, the 2026 enrollment plan significantly reduced by 45.7% (fewer spots intensifying competition), the total number of Yunnan Province candidates significantly increased by about 32% (expanded competition pool), the university's high Douyin heat and major popularity, etc., although the reduction in enrollment in the supply-demand elasticity model points to a forward shift in ranking, the surge in candidate numbers and increased application popularity form a hedge. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1210, and a range of 1072–1348.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- No other tiered majors available (only 1 enrollment major category for Physics Category in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None (only 1 major category for Physics Category in 2026, no low-score majors to choose from).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category only has one enrollment major category, Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information), with no room for major tier selection. Rankings within the predicted range of 1072–1348 have a higher probability of admission; rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<1072) can be safely admitted; rankings worse than the upper limit of the range (>1348) require caution. It is recommended to treat this university as a sprint target, while also preparing other 985 universities of the same level as backups.
